summary: Frontend-only verification for Iteration 3: Ujjwal photo scale(1.1) revert. All requested assertions passed. Vaishnav (team-card-0): no transform, objectPosition 'center 20%'. Ujjwal (team-card-1): computed transform matrix(1.1, 0, 0, 1.1, 0, 0), objectPosition 'center 20%'. Both photos HTTP 200 and loaded (natural dims non-zero). Team heading rendered; use-cases-heading absent as required.
critical_code_review_comments: Ujjwal img bounding rect extends ~19px beyond parent horizontally (imgW=421.68 vs parentW=383.34) — this is the mathematical/expected result of scale(1.1) with transformOrigin: 'center top'. Parent `.aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden` clips it correctly; screenshot confirms clean framing. Not a bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team.jsx: Vaishnav has no photoScale; Ujjwal has photoScale=1.1, both with photoPos 'center 20%'. UseCases.jsx no longer has use-cases-heading. Verified at 1440x900 viewport on /#team.
